summary: v175時点で、stable側はordinary Dbounded contextだけのrouteとmarker-only routeを拒否し、ordinary-category semantic inputから4射影readinessへ接続するadapter監査に加えて、現在のstrict Dbounded left-calculus APIがpreadditive、zero object、全shift additivityだけを供給することをLeanで確認した。product_successではない。bounded側にはstrict-selected eligibility providerと同値な本体realization theorem、stable側にはfinite limits、finite colimits、pretriangulated、triangulated構造をDbounded C上で実際に構成する実装が残る。
known_gaps: bounded側では、strict-selected eligibility providerがboundedHomotopyObjectTrianglehIso13Realizationと同値であり、その本体realization theoremがまだ未証明である。
stable側では、strict Dbounded left-calculus APIからpreadditive、zero object、全shift additivityまでは得られるが、finite limits、finite colimits、pretriangulated、triangulated構造をDbounded C上で構成する証明がまだない。
product_success用のterminal outcome、authoritative review packet zip、外部sidecar SHA256、fresh claim review acceptanceはまだ作成していない。
worker_frontier_summary: v174 adds a parent-owned Dbounded semantic stable input adapter after v173 ported w133 and v172 ported w132. No product-success packet was produced.
claim_review_result: not_run_nonproduct; fresh claim review is required only before product_success completion
remaining_gaps: bounded側は、自明なdistinguished endpoint eligibility upgradeがIntModuleCat反例で拒否されたため拒否済みです。strict-selected eligibilityはarbitrary weak endpoint witnessを除外しますが、そのproviderはboundedHomotopyObjectTrianglehIso13Realizationと同値であり、残る本体証明を短絡しません。

stable側は、full single certificateからproduct-review-shaped readiness evidenceを経由してconsumer-side product-gate pass witnessへ変換する監査constructorは通り、ordinary-category semantic inputから単一certificate形の4射影readinessへ接続するadapterも通ったが、ordinary Dbounded contextからHasFiniteLimits、HasFiniteColimits、HasZeroObject、全shift additivity、Pretriangulated、IsTriangulatedを含むsemantic inputを構成する実装が未完成です。
packet auditはfailed_nonterminalを正しく拒否する状態であり、product_successのterminal outcomeやpacket zipはまだ作っていません。
next_recommended_goal: Attack OrdinaryContextToDboundedFourProjectionProvider or define a nontrivial distinguished endpoint eligibility predicate; keep product_success false until all bounded/stable gates and external packet audit pass.

w126-stable-dbounded-certificate-provide.product_effect: no_product_success_claim; stable provider route remains missing

w127-mapping-cone-selected-provider-prob.product_effect: narrows bounded route; unconditional weak endpoint provider is refuted over IntModuleCat

w130-distinguished-eligibility-provider-.product_effect: no_product_success_claim; provider-side result is integrated and the trivial upgrade is refuted, leaving only a genuinely nontrivial eligibility route

w132-nontrivial-distinguished-eligibilit.product_effect: no_product_success_claim; the strict-selected provider excludes arbitrary weak witnesses but is equivalent to the existing bounded strict-realization frontier

w133-dbounded-four-projection-provider-r.product_effect: no_product_success_claim; ordinary Dbounded evidence is classified as rejected ordinary-only route unless a full stable four-projection provider is supplied
